title: Loki and the Holy Knights
description: On pages 11–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #10, Nami, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Five Elders, Luffy as The Elbaf conflict sharpens around Loki, the God’s Knights, giant children, and the secrets of the island’s royal past.
scene: The Elbaf conflict sharpens around Loki, the God’s Knights, giant children, and the secrets of the island’s royal past.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Quest castle, near the Western Village

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Hey!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What are you twerps doing here? We guards can't let you roam free, y"know!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are you part of the straw hat crew? What business do you have in this country?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: We're looking for the one called Low.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Dagya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Lori?! why would you want to see that criminal?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Our country suffered greatly because of him! He's the Kinslaying fiend who killed our beloved King Harold!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then will you tell me where he is???

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We can't do that, on the off chance he uses you to escape somehow...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: That's why this castle is so empty!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: So you won't tell me???

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sorry, this was a waste of time after all.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: It hurts!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Huh! What's wrong?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hm...No...this has to be some sort of joke...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: BOG!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: It hurts!! AaaAA!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: BOG!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: BOG!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is what happens when you're too rude and prideful.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I WASN'T REALLY ASKING BEFORE.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: GWAAH!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This time I'm ordering you to tell me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: WAA... What's going on?!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Western Village, Elbaf

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've come a long way from the East Blue!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Yeah, we finally made it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Hey, the straw hats are back!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We always dreamed of coming to the country of giants!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: The Homeland of the World's Greatest Warriors!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: We've been expecting you!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: After all, you small folk defended our pride!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: You freed us after we were fooled!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: And you saved me from being erased!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All of us would like to officially welcome you to Elbaf!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Whoa!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We may be small but they aren't looking down on us!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi sh

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Here's to the great pirate, straw hat luffy!!! One of the four emperors!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: RAAAAH!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And to his crew that took down those monsters, Kaido and big mom. At Wano!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: WOOOW!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: raise your camaraderie cups...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: ...for the straw hat crew!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Wowww!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Cheers!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: (Rash!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Bojajajajajajajajajajajajajajajajajajajajajajajajajajajajajajajajajajajajajajajajajajajajajajajajajajajajajajajajajajajajajaja

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: It seems the straw hats have returned!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Huh, aren't you the giant that was caught on sabady?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I see...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: That's right! Call me Staseen!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: After hajrudin told me we were gonna be under your umbrella...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll definitely repay this debt one day!! Thank you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: A refresher on Stansen

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A childhood friend of Hajrudin that was captured while napping and brought to be sold at the human auction house.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "Due to another incident, the straw hat crew caused a commotion that allowed him to go free.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: BOJA JA JA JA JA!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh my, it looks like we have some tiny guests!!

dialogue.speaker: Five Elders
dialogue.text: Elder Jarul, you made it!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: MOUNTAIN BEARD JARUL (hero of the giants: the oldest one in the world) 40b-years-old

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: That giant's built like a mountain!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Are you all having fun?

dialogue.speaker: Five Elders
dialogue.text: Elder Jarul is here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Hm? Who's that?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, there's a sword in your head, gramps!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: BOJA JA JA! Oh, this old thing?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I'm lucky my helmet saved me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: But it's going right through?!

summary: This part advances the Loki and the Holy Knights through 71 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
